meme.title: When you look into the abyss...

headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Opinion: Cat of the week (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-06-05)
